analysis_commentary: REPLICATE 3/3 600s: last_probe max_prob 0.041 (-62% vs baseline 0.107, healthy), legal_mass 0.0026 (-99.5% vs 0.561, illegal_mass 0.997 just below 0.99 collapse threshold).
